testcase.name: test_backend_health
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_notifications_api.py:95: in test_backend_health assert response.status_code == 200, f"Health check failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Health check failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_send_test_notification
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_notifications_api.py:317: in test_send_test_notification assert "error" in data or "No registered devices" in str(data), f"Unexpected response: {data}" E AssertionError: Unexpected response: {'success': False, 'devices_notified': 0, 'total_devices': 2} E assert ('error' in {'devices_notified': 0, 'success': False, 'total_devices': 2} or 'No registered devices' in "{'success': False, 'devices_notified': 0, 'total_devices': 2}") E + where "{'success': False, 'devices_notified': 0, 'total_devices': 2}" = str({'devices_notified': 0, 'success': False, 'total_devices': 2})
